rulings.Case Title: JENNIFER SARKANY ET AL VS. CHRISTIE WEST ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Plaintiffs Motion For Clarification Regarding Courts May 1, 2026 Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 12, 2026. Line 1.1. PLAINTIFFs Motion For Clarification Regarding Courts May 1, 2026 Order is CONTINUED to June 18, 2026, on the Court's own motion. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

PLAINTIFF DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS, LLC Motion For Entry Of Judgment For Possession And Damages Pursuant To The Parties Stipulation is GRANTED pursuant to CCP 664.6. rulings.Case Title: 1188 MISSION ST LP VS. MITCHELL AHRENS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Vacating And Setting Aside Judgement Entered On May 20, 2026
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 12, 2026. Line 8. DEFENDANT MITCHELL AHRENS Motion For An Order Vacating And Setting Aside Judgement Entered On May 20, 2026 is DENIED. Defendant provides no authority for the relief sought in this motion. On its own motion, the Court strikes subsection (e) regarding monetary damages from the Judgment entered on May 20, 2026. This matter will be heard by the Honorable Samuel K.
